questions.photoDescription: A woman is standing at a cash register in a clothing store, scanning a customer's items. The customer is holding a credit card ready to pay.

options.A: The customer is trying on clothes.
options.B: The store clerk is scanning items at the register.
options.C: The woman is arranging clothes on a shelf.
options.D: The customer is returning an item.

questions.explanation: The woman behind the register is using a scanner on the customer's items, which is typical checkout procedure.

questions.photoDescription: A construction worker wearing a hard hat and safety vest is operating a large piece of machinery at a building site. Other workers are visible in the background carrying materials.

options.A: The construction site is closed for the day.
options.B: A worker is operating machinery at a building site.
options.C: The workers are taking a break.
options.D: A delivery truck is unloading supplies.

questions.explanation: The worker is actively using machinery while others carry materials, showing ongoing construction activity.

audioSegments.text: Look at the picture marked number 1 in your test book.
(A) The customer is trying on clothes.
(B) The store clerk is scanning items at the register.
(C) The woman is arranging clothes on a shelf.
(D) The customer is returning an item.
Look at the picture marked number 2 in your test book.
(A) The construction site is closed for the day.
(B) A worker is operating machinery at a building site.
(C) The workers are taking a break.
(D) A delivery truck is unloading supplies.
